title: Glowing Trim Elytra
description:
Glowing Trim Elytra pack change elytra into glowing trim elytras
16 colors and 18 trim designs.
this pack works on just re-naming elytra and make them glowing
version supported-1.16-latest
body:
✨ Glowing Trim Elytra Pack ✨

🔥 Turn your Elytra into glowing masterpieces.

💡 16 Colors × 18 Designs = 288 Unique Combinations

Customize your Elytra with 16 colors and 18 unique glowing trim designs — all with smooth glowing effects that work even without shaders.

Stand out. Fly different.

────────────────────────
⚡ Features

• 🌈 16 Color Variants
• 🛡️ 18 Trim Designs
• ✨ Glowing (Emissive) Effects
• 🎮 Works with & without shaders
• 🔥 Lightweight & multiplayer-friendly
• ⚡ Mix & match colors and trims to create your own unique style

────────────────────────
📌 How It Works

Rename your Elytra using:
[Color Code] + [Design Code]

Examples:
r14, a10, l6, g7, c4, d16, l2, n9, i3, q12, ch18, rs17, p15, m5, gb6, s10

Instantly transforms your Elytra’s appearance in-game.

────────────────────────

🎨 Colors [16]

| Color Name        | Code |
| ----------------- | ---- |
| Amethyst          | a    |
| Copper            | c    |
| Cherry            | ch   |
| Diamond           | d    |
| Emerald           | e    |
| Gold              | g    |
| Iron              | i    |
| Lapis             | l    |
| Netherite         | n    |
| Quartz            | q    |
| Redstone          | r    |
| Resin             | rs   |
| Prismarine        | p    |
| Gilded Blackstone | gb   |
| Magma             | m    |
| Sculk             | s    |

────────────────────────

🛡️ Trim Designs [18]

| Design    | Code |
| --------- | ---- |
| Bolt      | 1    |
| Coast     | 2    |
| Dune      | 3    |
| Eye       | 4    |
| Flow      | 5    |
| Host      | 6    |
| Raiser    | 7    |
| Rib       | 8    |
| Sentry    | 9    |
| Shaper    | 10   |
| Silence   | 11   |
| Snout     | 12   |
| Spire     | 13   |
| Tide      | 14   |
| Vex       | 15   |
| Ward      | 16   |
| Wayfinder | 17   |
| Wild      | 18   |

────────────────────────

✨ What This Pack Changes

After applying the pack:
• Elytra appearance is fully transformed
• Updated GUI elements

────────────────────────

⚙️ Requirements

• OptiFine (Required for full functionality)
• Enable:
  • Emissive Textures
  • Custom Items

────────────────────────

🔧 Alternative Mods (Fabric / Forge)

Fabric Mods:
• EMF (Entity Model Features)
• ETF (Entity Texture Features)
• Continuity
• CIT Resewn
• Indium

Forge Mods:
• EMF (Entity Model Features)
• ETF (Entity Texture Features)
• Connectedness
• Fusion (Connected Textures)

────────────────────────

❗ Troubleshooting

• Reload resource packs if it stops working
• Check OptiFine version
• Make sure OptiFine is installed correctly

────────────────────────

🌍 Compatibility

• ✔ Singleplayer & Multiplayer
• ✔ Minecraft 1.16 → Latest
• ✔ Separate files for each version

────────────────────────

🎉 Final Note

Upgrade your Elytra.
Fly brighter. Fly different.

Make every flight stand out.

❤️ Thanks for downloading!
